home.h2: Website Creation in {{city}} – Digital Marketing Agency in Morocco
home.p1: Looking for a web agency in {{city}} specializing in professional website creation, natural SEO and Google Ads campaign management? MouDev is the leading digital marketing agency in {{city}} to strengthen your online presence and generate qualified leads. Request your free quote today.
home.p2: MouDev designs your professional website in {{city}} — showcase site, product catalogue, e-commerce store or custom portal. Our team of developers and webdesigners delivers fast, secure, 100% responsive websites optimized for Google ranking from day one.
home.p3: Our expertise in Google Ads and SEO in {{city}} lets you outrank your competitors on search engines. From design to web maintenance, MouDev handles your full digital transformation and supports SMEs and large businesses in {{city}} in their online growth.

packs.h2: Our packages to build your website

web.title: Website Creation & Webdesign
web.desc: Showcase, catalogue, e-commerce and custom portal sites. From careful webdesign to web maintenance, we handle your full online presence with modern, high-performance technologies.

seo.title: Search Engine Optimization (SEO)
seo.desc: Optimize your Google visibility and generate sustainable organic traffic with a local and national SEO strategy tailored to your industry and target market.

ads.desc: Targeted Google Ads campaigns to maximize your return on investment. We manage your advertising budgets precisely to attract qualified prospects and increase your conversions.

process.subheading: A proven and transparent methodology to design your website efficiently, on time and within your budget.

steps.title: Analysis & Discovery
steps.desc: We start by understanding your business objectives, target audience and market. This phase includes competitor analysis and positioning study.

steps.title: Design & Conception
steps.desc: Creation of custom visual mockups that reflect your brand identity. You validate every design aspect before development begins.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: Your site is built with the most performant technologies, integrating all required features and ensuring perfect compatibility on all devices.

steps.title: Testing & SEO Optimization
steps.desc: Rigorous performance, security and UX testing. Technical optimization for Google ranking and page loading speed.

steps.title: Launch
steps.desc: Going live after final validation. Hosting setup, SSL certificate and all tracking tools (Google Analytics, Search Console).

steps.title: Support & Evolution
steps.desc: Ongoing support after launch: technical assistance, updates, and site evolution according to your needs and digital market trends.

items.q: How much does website creation cost in {{city}}?
items.a: The price depends on the type and complexity of the project. Our packages range from a simple showcase site to complete e-commerce platforms. Contact us for a free, personalized quote tailored to your budget and goals.

items.q: How long does it take to deliver a website?
items.a: A showcase site is delivered in 1 to 2 weeks, a catalogue site in 2 to 3 weeks, and an e-commerce in 3 to 5 weeks. Timelines depend on the availability of content (texts, images, logo) you provide.

items.q: Will my site rank well on Google in {{city}}?
items.a: Yes. All our sites are delivered with full technical SEO: title and meta tags, H1/H2/H3 structure, clean URLs, optimized images, fast and responsive site. We also offer advanced SEO services to rank your site on Google's first page in {{city}}.

items.q: Can I update my site's content myself after delivery?
items.a: Absolutely. All our sites come with an intuitive admin interface letting you update texts, images, products and pages without any technical knowledge. A training session is included in all packages.

items.q: Do you offer maintenance and support after delivery?
items.a: Yes. We provide responsive technical support via WhatsApp and phone after delivery. Monthly maintenance contracts are available for updates, security and site evolution.

items.q: Will my site work on mobile and tablet?
items.a: Yes, all our sites are 100% responsive and automatically adapt to smartphones, tablets and computers. Mobile-friendliness is essential for SEO and user experience — it's included in all packages.

items.q: Do you only work in {{city}} or across Morocco?
items.a: MouDev works across Morocco and internationally. We collaborate with clients in Casablanca, Tangier, Marrakech, Rabat, Fes, Agadir and many other cities. All project management is done remotely via WhatsApp, email and video calls.

items.q: What is included in the hosting?
items.a: Hosting included in our packages covers: high-performance SSD storage, SSL certificate (HTTPS), professional emails with your domain, regular backups and domain name for the first year. 99.9% uptime guaranteed.
